languages.text: "Быть верным слугой Бога-Императора в бою с ксеноересью — мой священный долг".
"It is my sacred duty to be a faithful servant of the God-Emperor in the struggle against xenoheresy."
languages.original_text: "Быть верным слугой Бога-Императора в бою с ксеноересью — мой священный долг".

traits.locale_text: "It is my sacred duty to be a faithful servant of the God-Emperor in the struggle against xenoheresy."
"It is my sacred duty to be a faithful servant of the God-Emperor in the struggle against xenoheresy."
"It is my sacred duty to be a faithful servant of the God-Emperor in the struggle against xenoheresy."

languages.text: 「異教徒の異端に対する闘いにおいて、私は神皇帝の忠実なしもべであることが、私の聖なる義務である」
languages.original_text: "It is my sacred duty to be a faithful servant of the God-Emperor in the struggle against xenoheresy."

traits.locale_text: 異教徒の異端に対する闘いにおいて、私は神皇帝の忠実なしもべであることが、私の聖なる義務である。

languages.text: «Es mi sagrado deber servir al Dios Emperador en la lucha con la xenoherejía».
languages.original_text: "It is my sacred duty to be a faithful servant of the God-Emperor in the struggle against xenoheresy."

traits.locale_text: «Es mi sagrado deber servir al Dios Emperador en la lucha con la xenoherejía».

languages.text: “在对抗异形造物的斗争中，做神皇忠实的仆从是我的神圣职责。”
languages.original_text: "It is my sacred duty to be a faithful servant of the God-Emperor in the struggle against xenoheresy."

traits.locale_text: “在对抗异形造物的斗争中，做神皇忠实的仆从是我的神圣职责。”

languages.text: "Es ist meine heilige Pflicht, dem Gottimperator im Kampf gegen die Xeno-Ketzerei treu zu dienen."
languages.original_text: "It is my sacred duty to be a faithful servant of the God-Emperor in the struggle against xenoheresy."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist meine heilige Pflicht, dem Gottimperator im Kampf gegen die Xeno-Ketzerei treu zu dienen."

languages.text: "Zeno kâfirliğine karşı mücadelede Tanrı İmparator'un sadık bir hizmetkârı olmak, benim kutsal görevimdir."
languages.original_text: "It is my sacred duty to be a faithful servant of the God-Emperor in the struggle against xenoheresy."

traits.locale_text: "Zeno kâfirliğine karşı mücadelede Tanrı İmparator'un sadık bir hizmetkârı olmak, benim kutsal görevimdir."

languages.text: « Il est de mon devoir sacré de servir fidèlement l'Empereur-Dieu dans la lutte contre la xénohérésie. »
languages.original_text: "It is my sacred duty to be a faithful servant of the God-Emperor in the struggle against xenoheresy."

traits.locale_text: « Il est de mon devoir sacré de servir fidèlement l'Empereur-Dieu dans la lutte contre la xénohérésie. »
